requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Lebanon PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——黎巴嫩光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——黎巴嫩光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: For Lebanon PV inverter imports and projects, EMC evidence should be prepared against IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment and the relevant IEC 61000-series tests, including harmonic-current and immunity / emissions evidence requested by the importer, LIBNOR conformity route, installer, insurer, or project owner. Lebanon commonly uses Lebanese standards (NL) that may adopt or reference IEC standards, so the exact LIBNOR scope should be confirmed for the product and import route. For grid-interactive installations, EMC evidence should be read together with 220/380 V, 50 Hz country settings and anti-islanding / utility-interface evidence.
summary.zh: 黎巴嫩光伏逆变器进口和项目应按IEC 62920光伏功率变换设备及相关IEC 61000系列测试准备EMC证据，包括进口商、LIBNOR合格评定路径、安装商、保险方或项目业主要求的谐波电流以及抗扰度/发射证据。黎巴嫩通常使用可能采用或引用IEC标准的黎巴嫩标准（NL），因此应针对产品和进口路径确认具体LIBNOR范围。对于并网互动安装，EMC证据应与220/380 V、50 Hz国家参数和防孤岛/公用电网接口证据一并阅读。
summary.zht: 黎巴嫩光伏逆變器進口和項目應按IEC 62920光伏功率轉換設備及相關IEC 61000系列測試準備EMC證據，包括進口商、LIBNOR合格評定路徑、安裝商、保險方或項目業主要求的諧波電流以及抗擾度/發射證據。黎巴嫩通常使用可能採用或引用IEC標準的黎巴嫩標準（NL），因此應針對產品和進口路徑確認具體LIBNOR範圍。對於併網互動安裝，EMC證據應與220/380 V、50 Hz國家參數和防孤島/公用電網介面證據一併閱讀。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonic-current emissions where applicable
LIBNOR Lebanese standards (NL) adoption / conformity route to be confirmed for the product

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is commonly assessed under GB/T 37408 and related China test programmes. While those tests may draw on IEC 61000-series methods, China GB/T evidence alone does not establish Lebanon LIBNOR conformity, IEC 62920 coverage, or project-owner acceptance. Exporters should map any Chinese EMC report clause-by-clause against IEC 62920 and the requested IEC 61000 tests.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC通常依据GB/T 37408及相关中国测试项目评估。尽管这些测试可能借鉴IEC 61000系列方法，仅有中国GB/T证据并不能确立黎巴嫩LIBNOR合格评定、IEC 62920覆盖或项目业主接受。出口商应将任何中国EMC报告逐条映射至IEC 62920及被要求的IEC 61000测试。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC通常依據GB/T 37408及相關中國測試項目評估。儘管這些測試可能借鑑IEC 61000系列方法，僅有中國GB/T證據並不能確立黎巴嫩LIBNOR合格評定、IEC 62920覆蓋或項目業主接受。出口商應將任何中國EMC報告逐條映射至IEC 62920及被要求的IEC 61000測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T EMC reports are useful only if they can be mapped to the IEC evidence requested in Lebanon. Prepare model-specific IEC 62920 EMC reports and applicable IEC 61000 test results from an accredited laboratory, plus installation notes for hybrid inverter / battery configurations because conducted and radiated emissions, harmonics, and immunity may vary by configuration and operating mode.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T EMC报告只有在能够映射到黎巴嫩要求的IEC证据时才有用。应准备来自认可实验室、针对具体型号的IEC 62920 EMC报告和适用IEC 61000测试结果，并为混合逆变器/电池配置准备安装说明，因为传导和辐射发射、谐波及抗扰度可能随配置和运行模式变化。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T EMC報告只有在能夠映射到黎巴嫩要求的IEC證據時才有用。應準備來自認可實驗室、針對具體型號的IEC 62920 EMC報告和適用IEC 61000測試結果，並為混合逆變器/電池配置準備安裝說明，因為傳導和輻射發射、諧波及抗擾度可能隨配置和運行模式變化。

mandatory_status.target: Product- and route-specific: required where LIBNOR conformity, importer due diligence, insurer, project owner, or EDL / LCEC grid-interactive review requests EMC evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary / certification-programme evidence under China GB/T routes; not automatically accepted as Lebanon IEC / LIBNOR evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat a China GB/T 37408 EMC certificate as automatic Lebanon acceptance. For Lebanon imports or projects, keep IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 EMC evidence for the exact inverter model and configuration, then confirm the LIBNOR, importer, EDL / LCEC, insurer, or owner requirement that actually applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要将中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书视为黎巴嫩自动接受。用于黎巴嫩进口或项目时，应为具体逆变器型号和配置保存IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000 EMC证据，并确认实际适用的LIBNOR、进口商、EDL / LCEC、保险方或业主要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要將中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書視為黎巴嫩自動接受。用於黎巴嫩進口或項目時，應為具體逆變器型號和配置保存IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000 EMC證據，並確認實際適用的LIBNOR、進口商、EDL / LCEC、保險方或業主要求。
